title: Thaumic Renaissance
description: Thaumcraft addon that currently add Expert recipe for planks and sticks.
body:
![Logo text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cdf90a01f2484efe9c30073e51697b492e517c8.png)
Welcome to **Thaumic Renaissance**, a brand new Thaumcraft 4 addon still in active development.

The mod currently add a new tab and researches for Arcane, Crucible and Compound (Wand casting) recipes for processing wood.
The config file allow to turn on/off Expert mode (harder recipes) and Integrations.

Current mod Integrations are : Forbidden Magic, Tainted Magic, Thaumic Bases, Twilight Forest and Thaumcraft 4 Tweaks.
(You can ask for mod Integrations that got wood to add to the recipes !)

![Research Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afda853d77c50a6cf87af0f7c24171d55752f5c0_0.webp)

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
